title: Feature Report — February 23, 2026
scope: Four areas of the Viperball engine were updated: kick pass stat tracking (critical bug fix), blocked drop kicks (new mechanic), the Diving Wing archetype (new flanker specialization), and safety/pindown rate tuning.

rationale.item: Kick pass TD yards double-counted: kicker's game_kick_pass_yards received yards both before and after TD determination, causing player stats to overcount by 60-70+ yards per game on TD-heavy games
Kick pass INT/fumble possession attribution: change_possession() called before Play object created, causing attempts to be counted against the wrong team
All snap kicks were exempt from the block check — only a path that was never called could be blocked; long-range DK attempts completely risk-free
Both safeties and pindowns occurring too frequently

delegation_events.decision: Design principle: 'Save possession before mutating state' — any play that can change possession must capture self.state.possession before calling change_possession()
delegation_events.quote: Any play that can change possession must capture self.state.possession into a local variable before calling change_possession(), then use the saved value in the Play object's possession field.

actions.description: KP stat tracking fix: player yard tracking moved to single assignment AFTER final yards_gained; possession saved before change_possession() in 5 affected return paths
Blocked drop kicks: 2.5% base block rate, block outcomes (70% D recovery / 30% dead ball), blocker selection prioritizing Diving Wing
Diving Wing archetype: flankers meeting tackling≥82/speed≥88/kicking≥60 thresholds; dk_block_bonus +0.008, reduced ball carrying
Safety rate tuning: checks now only inside 8-yard line; rates dramatically reduced (2-yd: 10%→1.8%)
Pindown return chance formula adjusted: return_speed/90 with 75% floor (was /200 no floor); measured rate ~5-7% (was 12.5%)

validation_claims.claim: KP stat tracking: attempts match (player vs play objects) 100% (40/40 team-sides), yards exact match 85% (34/40). 0 unaccounted discrepancies.
validation_claims.check_method: Run batch sim and compare player vs play-object team stats for attempts and yards

validation_claims.claim: Blocked DK 20-game batch: 160 total DK attempts, 4 blocked (2.5% rate), 1 block TD/1 defense recovery/2 dead balls.
validation_claims.check_method: Run 20-game batch sim and count DK block outcomes

validation_claims.claim: Safety rate measured ~1.7% per team per game (down from 10%); pindown rate ~5-7% per team per game (down from 12.5%)
validation_claims.check_method: Run batch sim and measure safety and pindown rates

non_actions.item: Penalty system replacing play.yards_gained after player stats recorded
non_actions.reason: Remaining small yard differences (15% of team-sides) are entirely from the penalty system replacing play.yards_gained after player stats are recorded — a separate, pre-existing issue.

residual_risks: 15% of team-sides still have small yard discrepancy due to penalty system replacing play.yards_gained after player stats recorded — pre-existing issue
unmapped_content: Files Modified: engine/game_engine.py (all four features). AARs Created section: 'docs/AAR_kick_pass_stat_tracking.md' for detailed technical breakdown of the KP stat fix — this feature report is a combined summary; detailed AAR was created as separate document. Note: this document mentions creating docs/AAR_kick_pass_stat_tracking.md as a downstream artifact — that AAR was already parsed separately. Diving Wing properties table: dk_block_bonus +0.008, yards_per_touch_modifier 0.80, fumble_modifier 0.90, td_rate_modifier 0.75, touches_target (3,6). Safety check tiers (before/after): ≤2yd 10%→1.8%, ≤5yd 6%→0.8%, ≤8yd 3%→0.3%; tiers ≤10, ≤12, ≤15 removed entirely.
parser_notes: Document title is 'Feature Report' not AAR — genre_confidence medium. Well-structured with rationale, validation metrics, and non_actions. One record covers all four features per single-document rule. Note this document references creating docs/AAR_kick_pass_stat_tracking.md which was parsed separately as viperball--2026-02-23--kick-pass-stat-tracking-fixes.
